name: Alejandra Torres
behaviour: Always has a next destination planned. Restless indoors; comes alive in nature or unfamiliar places.
communication_style: direct and story-driven, communicates best through shared experiences
relationship_goals: a partner who will share adventures and has their own independent life
background: Visited 60 countries before 26. Writes about the places tourism forgot. Learned to pack in a carry-on by necessity.
